creator: rz-rpi03@h-ka.de
text:
In reply to comment #1:
The current version of the patch uses 0 as the default pattern, as I was not
aware of an actual use in a non FDT environment. Sorry.

Which is likely the cause of the regession you describe in comment #2.

Of course I can change the patch to not modify anything if not compiled for
an FDT environment. I exepct to find some time to do and test it on the RPi 3B+
next week.
